---
title: "Appendix"
author: "Hanwen Liu"
format:
  html: 
   toc: true
  pdf: 
   toc: true
---

## The usage of AI
- How to clean dates in various formats in R
- How to display linear regression results in R
- Correct the description

## Screenshots
![How to clean dates in various formats in R](../images/Date cleaning.png)
![How to display linear regression results in R](../images/Liner regression.png)
![Correct the description](../images/Correct English.png)
